reliabilityChanges: Embedding replies must contain the exact requested vector count, finite values, and one consistent dimension across every indexing batch.
Incomplete or corrupt semantic results fail before IndexedDB replacement, preserving any older valid index.
Stored corrupt or gapped vector records must have contiguous indexes, non-empty text, consistent meeting IDs and dimensions, and finite values; invalid records are unindexed and rebuildable.
An embedding-worker crash rejects all pending requests, resets model state, installs a replacement worker, and visibly preserves full-text search as the fallback.

focusedCoverage: missing, non-finite, and mixed-dimension embedding rejection
corrupt vector comparison and gapped-index rejection
reject-all behavior for outstanding worker requests

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and fault-injection evidence does not prove physical locked 60/120-minute recording, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, worker replacement under mobile memory pressure, or destination-app receipt.
